sql.if: and exists (select x.id from lkt_comments_img x where x.comments_id=a.id limit 1)

mapper.select: SELECT count(distinct a.id) FROM lkt_comments AS a LEFT JOIN lkt_user AS m ON a.uid = m.user_id AND a.store_id = m.store_id LEFT JOIN lkt_order_details AS d ON d.id = a.order_detail_id WHERE a.store_id = #{store_id}

select count(1) from lkt_order_details AS a LEFT JOIN lkt_comments AS c ON a.r_sNo = c.oid AND a.sid = c.attribute_id LEFT JOIN lkt_order as o on a.r_sNo = o.sNo LEFT join lkt_configure as attr on attr.id = a.sid LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list as lpl on lpl.id = attr.pid LEFT JOIN lkt_mch as lm on lm.id = lpl.mch_id left join lkt_user as u on u.user_id=o.user_id
